title: Find All Duplicates in Array
statement:
Given an integer array `nums` of length `n` where all integers are in range `[1, n]` and each integer appears **once or twice**, find all integers that appear **twice**. Your solution must run in `O(n)` time and use `O(1)` extra space.

Print the duplicates in ascending order.

**Input:** Space-separated integers.
**Output:** Print duplicates in ascending order, space-separated. If none, print `-1`.
constraints:
- 1 ≤ n ≤ 10⁵
- 1 ≤ nums[i] ≤ n
- Each element appears once or twice.
